pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 98: Java source file created at this path relative to PROJECT_DIR

verifier.py line 70: if props_count >= 15: score += 25. Verified against LibraryApp.java which contains 17 user-facing strings (excluding numeric switch cases). The verifier uses 15 as the threshold for full credit on the properties file scoring.

privileged_info_summary: The externalize_strings_i18n task creates a synthetic Maven-based LibraryApp Java project at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/LibraryApp containing a target file at src/main/java/com/library/app/LibraryApp.java with 17 user-facing strings to be externalized. The task expects the Externalize Strings wizard to create messages.properties at src/main/java/com/library/app/messages.properties and Messages.java accessor class at src/main/java/com/library/app/Messages.java. The verifier requires a minimum of 15 entries in the properties file for full credit, corresponding to the actual count of externalizeable strings in the source code.
